reviews.name: Maarten Oosterhoff
reviews.text: After two years of walking around with a stiff and painful shoulder — tried dry needling, physio, etc. — I returned to Dr. Jahani. After a thorough first analysis, the first treatment was immediately effective. Painless, with restored range of motion. After 10 treatments I have full freedom of movement again.

reviews.name: Niels van Opzeeland
reviews.text: Dr. Jahani and his team helped me fantastically with preparations for the Amsterdam half marathon. Due to poor posture, my calves were cramping while running. After treatment the problem was completely resolved and I finished the race without issues.

reviews.name: Michel K.
reviews.text: Within 2 weeks, my severe neck, shoulder and back complaints were completely resolved by Dr. Jahani. My profession is very demanding on my back and I work 5–6 days a week, but I can handle it without problems now. I keep coming back regularly for maintenance.

reviews.name: Ruben Hulsebosch
reviews.text: When I came in I was completely locked up — I could barely move my neck and the pain was unbearable. Due to my height (2.02m) and sedentary job it was time for action. Dr. Jahani got to work immediately. After an intensive treatment plan with daily home exercises, I was completely pain-free within 3–4 weeks.

reviews.name: Eline de Ligt
reviews.text: After years of neck pain I finally took the step to visit a chiropractor. I wish I had done it sooner. Dr. Jahani is a very skilled man who, beyond his chiropractic specialty, is also highly competent in other medical areas. He also puts you at ease quickly, which is great when you're coming in 3x a week for intensive treatment.

reviews.name: John Leijdekker
reviews.text: I had been suffering from lower back pain for many years — had trouble getting dressed and walking, and my back constantly gave out. Through Dr. Jahani's intensive treatment and disciplined home exercises twice a day, I've now recovered to 85–90%. I can even run again.

reviews.name: Dominic
reviews.text: After trying several top chiropractors in Amsterdam, Dr. Jahani is my favourite and in my opinion the best in Amsterdam. His excellent rapport, attention to detail, and passion for improving patient health deliver a fantastic level of service. I've seen Dr. Jahani during several periods of my life over the past 6 years and always gotten an excellent result.

reviews.name: Michael Pilarczyk
reviews.text: It is not only solving the problem, but also the improvement of my body and increasing the strength of everything related to the cause of the problem. Within a few months I moved again fairly smoothly and my body feels much stronger. Dr. Jahani has a clear vision of health — to me he is 'the miracle doctor.'

reviews.name: Anonymous patient
reviews.text: After a surgical complication left my arm fully paralyzed from the shoulder down, I was left without help until a colleague recommended Dr. Jahani. After two months of treatment I could move my hand again — I could cook and peel vegetables. After five months I passed my driving re-examination and I can drive my car again.

heroSub: Amsterdam's neuro-based chiropractic and pain management specialist. If you have back pain, neck pain or headaches — call or text us today and stop pain immediately.

services.title: Neuro-Based Spinal Adjustment
services.desc: Precision chiropractic corrections that decrease pain, restore mobility, and kick-start your recovery from the very first session.

services.title: Medical Acupuncture
services.desc: Targeted needle therapy to reduce inflammation, relieve deep muscle pain, and prepare your body for optimal chiropractic results.

services.title: Therapeutic Massage
services.desc: Deep-tissue or relaxation massage to release tension, improve circulation, and help your body unwind after a long working day.

services.title: Custom Foot Orthotics
services.desc: Foot Levelers orthotics crafted specifically for your feet — delivering superior comfort, support, and full-body alignment correction.

comboDesc: An integrated approach combining physiotherapy and chiropractic techniques for complex or persistent conditions.
conditionsDesc: From sudden injuries to long-standing chronic pain, Dr. Jahani has the expertise and experience to help you recover fully.
conditionsClick: ↓ Click a condition for more information
conditionsNote: Since most acute and chronic conditions are painful, it's not always possible or advisable to adjust patients straight away. The approach Dr. Jahani has developed is to first start with medical acupuncture to reduce inflammation and pain for the first few sessions, and then begin gentle mobilisation or manipulation to restore movement. This is what separates us from every other chiropractor or clinic — they simply don't have this option.
approachDesc: We don't just treat the symptom. Our structured approach ensures you get better — and stay better.

phases.title: Relief Care
phases.desc: We focus on reducing your pain as quickly as possible so you can function and sleep normally again. Based on the patient expectation, we can adjust the intensity of the treatment accordingly.

phases.title: Corrective Care
phases.desc: Once pain is under control, we correct underlying structural issues to prevent recurring problems.

phases.title: Wellness Care
phases.desc: Ongoing maintenance to keep your spine healthy, your body resilient, and your quality of life high.

phasesNote: At the end of each phase, the doctor will evaluate and explain the best options and advice available to the patient to continue care and to prevent relapse.
firstVisitDesc: We understand visiting a chiropractor for the first time can raise questions. Here's exactly what happens during your first appointment.

firstVisitSteps.title: Patient Forms
firstVisitSteps.desc: Complete health history and condition intake forms upon arrival.

firstVisitSteps.title: Consultation
firstVisitSteps.desc: Discuss health problems, concerns, and treatment goals with Dr. Jahani. The first visit is about understanding your condition and what you want to achieve.

firstVisitSteps.title: Examination
firstVisitSteps.desc: Full chiropractic exam including reflex and flexibility testing, plus neurological, orthopedic, postural, and physical assessments. Nothing is done without your consent.

firstVisitSteps.title: X-Ray Studies
firstVisitSteps.desc: If needed based on your condition, X-rays are taken to develop the most effective treatment plan and check for serious spinal conditions.

firstVisitSteps.title: Report of Findings
firstVisitSteps.desc: Dr. Jahani provides a full report covering: How can he help you? How often will you need to come in? What will the cost be?

firstVisitSteps.title: Treatment
firstVisitSteps.desc: At the end of the examination, Dr. Jahani will explain the most effective and suitable treatment options. You may agree to proceed with the treatment or not — the choice is entirely yours. Since there are no extra fees for the first treatment, it is highly advisable to try it and see the difference for yourself. A personalised treatment plan can only be made after the first treatment; without it, we are unable to make future care recommendations.

firstVisitSteps.title: Wellness Program
firstVisitSteps.desc: If necessary, Dr. Jahani or associates will suggest a home wellness program which may include stretching and strengthening exercises, as well as ice/heat instructions to support your recovery between visits.

pricingDesc: Clear, upfront pricing for all services. Payment is due after each visit (cash or card). We provide receipts for insurance reimbursement.

pricingRows.treatment: First Consultation Adult (incl. medical acupuncture + first spinal correction)
First Consultation Children up to 12 years old

pricingPackageNote: Since most insurance will only reimburse your costs partially, based on your condition, you might qualify to benefit from available treatment packages.
paymentNote: Payment: The amount due will be settled after each visit. Payment can be made by cash or debit card. You can submit the receipt to your insurance company.
insuranceP1: Nearly all health insurers include chiropractic care in their supplementary packages. The requirement is that the chiropractor is a member of a professional association (NCA) and registered with the Dutch Chiropractic Foundation (SCN). Most insurers classify chiropractic care as "alternative medicine" or "movement therapy."
insuranceP2: Health4Life is fully registered with NCA and SCN, meeting all insurer requirements.
insuranceLinkPre: For a complete list of insurers:
ctaH2: Ready to Stop Living with Pain?
ctaP: Call or text us today. We will assess your condition, explain your treatment options clearly, and get you started on the path to recovery — without the jargon.
aboutSubtitle: DC, B.Sc. Biochemistry · Canadian Chiropractor · BMAS Medical Acupuncturist
aboutP1: Dr. Jahani earned his Bachelor of Science in Biochemistry from York University, Toronto (1999), followed by his Doctor of Chiropractic degree from the New York Chiropractic College (2003). He founded Health4Life Chiropractic in Amsterdam South in 2010.
aboutP2: With 20+ years of clinical experience across the US, Canada, and Europe, Dr. Jahani specializes in neuro-based chiropractic care integrating functional neurology, BMAS-certified medical acupuncture, and soft-tissue therapy — an evidence-based approach that consistently delivers results where other treatments have failed.

faqs.a: Most patients experience little to no discomfort during an adjustment. You may hear a popping sound — this is simply gas releasing from the joint, similar to cracking your knuckles. Some mild soreness after the first few sessions is normal and typically passes within 24 hours.

faqs.q: How many sessions will I need?
faqs.a: This depends on your condition. After the first visit, Dr. Jahani will give you a clear treatment plan with an estimated number of sessions. Most acute conditions improve significantly within 4–8 sessions.

faqs.q: Do I need a referral from my GP?
faqs.a: No. You can book directly without a GP referral.

faqs.q: What is the difference between neuro-based chiropractic and regular chiropractic?
faqs.a: Neuro-based chiropractic focuses on the relationship between spinal alignment and the nervous system. Rather than just treating symptoms, it targets the root neurological cause of pain and dysfunction for more lasting results.

faqs.q: Do you treat children and infants?
faqs.a: Yes. Dr. Jahani has experience treating infants and children. The first consultation for children under 12 is €110. Techniques used for younger patients are gentle and specifically adapted.

faqs.q: Is chiropractic covered by Dutch health insurance?
faqs.a: Almost all Dutch supplemental health insurance plans (aanvullende verzekering) cover chiropractic. Health4Life is registered with the NCA and SCN, which are required by most insurers. Check your policy or visit chiropractievergoeding.nl.

bookingDesc: Pick a date and time that works for you. We will confirm your booking within a few hours by phone or email.

heroReviews.name: Marieke van den Berg
heroReviews.text: After just four sessions with Dr. Jahani I felt like a different person. Two years of pain — gone.

heroReviews.name: David Okonkwo
heroReviews.text: I had been to two other clinics with no results. The combination of chiropractic and acupuncture made an enormous difference.

heroReviews.name: Lisa Fontaine
heroReviews.text: Treated with great care throughout my pregnancy. Professional, warm, and genuinely invested in your recovery.
